_notes: BENCH-02 single source of truth committed before data collection for D-04/D-04a/D-04b/D-04c. CYCLE_HZ replaces the implicit cadence constant in n-floor math. ICMPLIB_REPRESENTATIVE_*_TOL_MS are HARD validity gates; Plan 03 returns input_error if the dev icmplib arm is outside the band, not a warning. CPU_NORMALIZATION=per_core fixes cpu_pct to percent-of-whole-machine by dividing by n_cores. Do not duplicate threshold literals in markdown.
